title: Learning Path for Group Theory Fundamentals
description: A flowchart illustrating the logical progression and dependencies for learning foundational Group Theory concepts.
elements: Key Properties (Abelian, Order of a Group/Element)
relationships: Start with the Definition of a Group, which is built upon the four Group Axioms. These axioms are then explored through concrete Examples. Understanding these leads to discovering Key Properties. Finally, these concepts allow for the study of more advanced structures like Subgroups and Cyclic Groups.
